feed.title: SAP Community - Joule
feed.subtitle: Joule blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: A First Look at SAP HANA Cloud, AI-Assisted Database Administration
entry.content:
We recently introduced a couple of exciting new features in the SAP HANA Cloud administration and monitoring tools designed to enhance and streamline database management operations by leveraging generative artificial intelligence.  First, we have a Gen AI virtual assistant feature, enabling administrators to execute operational tasks through conversational chat, navigate the user interface, and generate SQL statements from text queries.  Second, we have the issue summary generation functionality, helping operators to troubleshoot issues in their SAP HANA Cloud instances by providing insights into potential problems and possible resolutions using a vast collection of available information.

Let’s examine these two new features in detail but note that to utilize the new Gen AI capability, you must enable it in the user settings of SAP HANA Cloud Central.  Here’s how you do that:

Enabling Gen AI in SAP HANA Cloud Central

Note: your SAP BTP user needs the role collection "SAP HANA Cloud Administrator".  If this is not the case, you can find details on how to assign this role collection in Subscribing to the SAP HANA Cloud Administration Tools (Multi-Environment) in the SAP Help Portal.

Launch SAP HANA Cloud Central and open the user menu from the top right.  Click on Settings.

Select Gen AI settings and familiarize yourself with the restricted period and usage limits.  Your daily usage limit for this functionality is 0.5 Capacity Units per user at no additional cost, until July 2025.  You can also review the different links to get more details on using Gen AI in SAP HANA Cloud, as well as the AI terms and conditions.

Enable the AI-assisted database administration capabilities by clicking on the toggle button.  You must accept the AI terms and conditions to continue.  Once accepted, you’ll see the toggle button’s status change to Enabled, along with the setting history to determine who updated this setting and when that happened.  Click on Save to dismiss the dialog.

After saving the settings, you will see a new button in the toolbar (looks like a gem) to launch Gen AI.

Virtual Assistant Functionality

You can ask Gen AI (i.e. virtual assistant) to perform tasks in SAP HANA Cloud Central.  Depending on your question, Gen AI will navigate to the appropriate screen to carry out the operation, navigate to a specific application, generate a summary of alerts, generate a SQL statement from your plain text query, or provide you with more information about a particular feature.

Launch Gen AI by clicking on its button in the toolbar.  The Gen AI dialog appears where you can type your question.

Notice that you can move the dialog by dragging its title bar and that you can maximize it in case you obtain a lengthy answer from Gen AI.  There are a few popular operations (create instance, show alerts overview, and create migration) readily available to execute via the provided buttons.  You can also recall previous plain text queries by pressing the up or down arrow key in the text box.

Let’s ask Gen AI to create an SAP HANA database.  Type “create an SAP HANA database” and click Send.  When creating such an instance, you have the choice of creating a new SAP HANA database or clone a database:

Click the button Clone SAP HANA database.  You are taken to the Provisioning Wizard, with the option to clone an SAP HANA database already selected, thus saving you a bit of time.  Click the Cancel button at the bottom right to abort this operation.

 

Let’s now ask Gen AI to create SQL queries for us.  We can start with a few basic statements:

  1. Ask Gen AI the following: how do I change a user's password with SQL?
  2. Ask Gen AI: how do I assign a privilege to a user using SQL?
  3. Ask Gen AI: give the SQL to display all audit policies

The correct SQL statements are generated, and you have the option to copy the statement to the clipboard or open it in the SQL Console.  Keep in mind that if you want to execute the statement in the SQL Console, you’ll need to connect to a running database instance.

Let’s now ask Gen AI something that a little more complex:

  1. Ask Gen AI: give the SQL for all connections for the user DBADMIN that are running

Again, we see the proper SQL statement with the correct WHERE clause, based on what you asked Gen AI.  Note that there will be cases where the generated SQL is not 100% exact.  However, it should give you a basic idea as to how the statement should look like so that you can change it accordingly.  As the Gen AI feature evolves over time, the accuracy of the generated SQL syntax will improve.

Depending on your SAP HANA Cloud deployment, what you can ask Gen AI to perform can be quite extensive.  Here are some examples:

  • Navigate to a specific application and obtain more information about a particular feature.

  • Generate a summary of alerts.

As you can see, using Gen AI can speed up the administration effort by easily guiding you to the appropriate application, based on what you want to do.  It can be handy when new database management features are included in SAP HANA Cloud because Gen AI may inform you about them as you perform a specific task.  Operators who are new to the SQL language can quickly generate statements to assist in the learning of the SQL scripts most relevant to their deployment.  For the more experienced SQL users, Gen AI can produce a SQL statement that can be viewed as a good starting point to be tweaked to accomplish more complex tasks.

Issue Summary Generation Functionality

For specific types of alerts, Gen AI can produce a detailed summary of the issues encountered.  These summaries provide charts, analysis of the situation, and recommended resolution steps.  This feature uses Gen AI to reference the relevant information from a huge source of documentation, including the product’s user assistance, SAP Notes, and knowledge-based articles (KBAs), based on the statistical data available for your SAP HANA Cloud instance.  If that statistical data is not available, Gen AI will simply offer general information on the issue at hand with steps on how to resolve it.

In the initial release of the SAP HANA Cloud, AI-assisted database administration, you can generate issue summaries for out of memory situations, blocked transactions, or delta merge issues.  Let’s look at one example.

As a prerequisite, I produced a blocked transaction condition that raised an error alert:

Now I asked Gen AI about the alerts and selected to obtain an overview:

Below the chart is the list of alerts and you can click the three-dot menu beside a specific alert to invoke a context menu.  I selected Troubleshoot Alert for the long-running blocking situation alert.

The issue summary generation details appear:

At this point, I’m presented with options to resolve my issue.  The analysis and chart point to an isolated incident, based on the trend for this type of issue.  I’m given the transaction IDs and I can use them in the performance management tools in SAP HANA Cloud Central, such as the User Transaction or SQL Statements applications.  Gen AI offers me a way to navigate to those applications.  Several recommendations are also displayed for me to consider, based on the large set of product documentation, SAP Notes, and KBAs available.  The net result of this feature is that it reduces the time and effort spent troubleshooting this type of issues.  For more information about this feature, please refer to Monitoring SAP HANA Cloud Instances Using Gen AI in the SAP Help Portal.

Limitations and Usage Terms

Finally, it’s important to cover the usage limits and terms.  You may have noticed that the Gen AI dialog mentions Joule.  This version of SAP HANA Cloud, AI-assisted database administration uses Joule with limited features in SAP HANA Cloud Central, a reduced set of capabilities tailored for use within the SAP HANA Cloud environment.  For more information about the scope of this technology, please refer to Using Gen AI in SAP HANA Cloud Central in the SAP Help Portal.

SAP HANA Cloud, AI-assisted database administration is only available in SAP BTP data center deployments where the SAP AI Core service is available.  For more information, please see SAP Note 3491182 - Production Center Deployments and Resource Plan Availability and SAP Note 3437766 - Availability of Generative AI Models.

When it comes to using Gen AI, you can use it at no additional cost until July 2025, with a daily limit of 0.5 Capacity Units (CU) per user.  After July 2025, or if you reach the daily limit, you’ll need to subscribe to the commercial version.

For now, I hope you enjoy and take advantage of the new generative AI capabilities in SAP HANA Cloud Central.  Feel free to leave a comment about your experience!

entry.title: Watch the Replays of Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!
entry.content:
GROW with SAP is a comprehensive package combining solutions, services, community support, and learnings to help businesses of all sizes successfully adopt cloud ERP. At its core lies SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, our fully-fledged cloud ERP designed to optimize processes and drive intelligent, sustainable operations. 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Early Release Series is a biannual event showcasing live sessions led by product experts. These sessions provide an exclusive preview of upcoming innovations, including AI-driven features and advancements with Joule, tailored to selected lines of business and industries. Spanning several days, the series offers expert demos, insider previews, and real-time Q&A, giving participants a first look at exciting updates and the opportunity to get their questions answered directly.

From January 21 to January 24, 2025, we're hosting 21 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you.

Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don't miss this chance and watch the recordings on demand– anywhere, anytime.

Please note that, as the series is still ongoing, not all recordings have been uploaded to the SAP Learning Hub yet. Thus, resulting in a "no classes available" note when following some of the links. 

 

Artificial Intelligence & AnalyticsWatch here
Enterprise Portfolio & Project ManagementWatch here
Professional ServicesWatch here
Solution Orders and Subscription BillingWatch here
SalesWatch here
Cross Technology TopicsWatch here
Environment, Health, and SafetyWatch here
RetailWatch here
Supply ChainWatch here
SAP User ExperienceWatch here
Public SectorWatch here
ManufacturingWatch here
Sourcing and ProcurementWatch here
Governance, Risk, and ComplianceWatch here
ServiceWatch here
FinanceWatch here
Two-Tier ERPWatch here
ExtensibilityWatch here
Product ComplianceWatch here
Asset ManagementWatch here
SAP Activate, SAP Cloud ALM, Test Automation ToolWatch here

 

An active SAP Learning Hub license is required to consume the recordings. Find out how to sign up​

  • As a customer:​ Access to at least the SAP Enterprise Support Edition is required. Follow these steps to sign up:​
    1.  Navigate to the sign-up page and click on "Sign Up".
    2. Authenticate yourself with your S-user ID and password.​
    3. The system will check your eligibility, create a new SAP Learning Hub user, and populate your learning catalogue. This process may take up to 2 hours.​
    4. You will receive a registration confirmation via e-mail once the registration process is complete.​
  • As a partner: Partners can access the recordings through their SAP Partner Edge Edition.​
  • As an SAP internal: Register here for the SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition (free of charge).

Experiencing issues? Make sure to be logged on before registering. In case of any other issues, reach out to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Live Product Expert Sessions.

Explore more replays of our past Early Release Series and find out more about our live product expert sessions here.

entry.title: Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Release
entry.content:
Welcome to a new era of innovation and seamless integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502! As we usher in 2025, it's the perfect time to celebrate the incredible journey we've shared with our public Cloud ERP community. Over the years, our customers have quickly gained extensive upgrade experience, all thanks to our continuous and seamless feature delivery. Reflecting on this progress, it's astonishing to note that our 33 major SaaS ERP release upgrades are equivalent to encapsulating 130+ years of upgrade experience based on the traditional on-premise deployment models. This showcases the high standard of our SaaS model. With the clean core approach and full lifecycle compliance embedded, we enable customers to harness the latest features instantly.

As our technological landscape continues to evolve, SAP remains at the forefront, driving innovations that empower businesses. I am excited to walk you through my key highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release.

Get ready for an exciting array of updates, including powerful AI enhancements, expanded capabilities of our generative AI co-pilot, Joule, and groundbreaking ERP innovations. Our 2502 release is here to further automate your operations, underpin agility in a cloud-first environment and drive more of your processes towards zero touch. Stay tuned as we dive into these transformative developments.

If you prefer watching rather than reading, you are welcome to check out my product update video: 

Figure 1: Check out my top highlights of the release in this video. 

 

AI-Powered UX Enhancements: Transforming User Interaction with Joule

Joule, our generative AI co-pilot, revolutionizes user experience by streamlining tasks through instant insights and intuitive navigation via natural language input. One notable feature is the new personalized card creation, enabling users to swiftly access vital ERP data such as purchase orders and delivery updates, thus, enhancing decision-making processes.

Figure 2: Get instant insights and swift access to your data with our natural language, generative AI copilot, Joule.

 

 

Our AI-driven UX innovations, AI-assisted smart summarization and AI-assisted easy filter, initially released as beta shipments in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, have now become generally available. Smart summarization leverages artificial intelligence to condense complex data into easily understandable summaries, saving time and boosting efficiency. Easy filter allows users to apply detailed filters using natural language, simplifying data exploration.

Figure 3: AI-assisted smart summarization saves time and boosts efficiency by condensing complex data into easily understandable summaries.

 

 

Figure 4: AI-assisted easy filter simplifies data exploration and reduces effort.

 

 

As we progress with AI-assisted UX features, the upcoming SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release introduces remarkable advancements in beta testing. These include: 

  • AI-assisted easy enterprise search,
  • AI-assisted smart personalization of My Home,  
  • and AI-assisted error explanation.  

Sign up through this link to start testing.

 

Enhancing Carbon Accountability with SAP Green Ledger

SAP Green Ledger is a transformative financial solution at the heart of carbon accounting. This is designed to integrate seamlessly with connected systems such as ERP and sustainability. By extending the scope of financial accounting to encompass carbon, it applies the principles of double-entry accounting to carbon quantities. These are posted on dimensions relevant to business steering, like profit centers and segments, offering a tangible perspective on carbon impact from provisioning through to delivery. The value proposition of SAP Green Ledger lies in its ability to track, value, and report the carbon footprint of end-to-end operations, with an emphasis on producing auditable and trustworthy reports. By analyzing carbon data alongside financial attributes, it generates insights pivotal for informed decision-making.

 

Figure 5: SAP Green Ledger integrates seamlessly with connected systems such as ERP and sustainability.

 

 

The key capabilities include integration support with other systems, replication of financial master data, importation and enrichment of material movements with carbon information and exporting carbon data for group reporting. Through its robust allocation management and comprehensive visualization, SAP Green Ledger allows businesses to compare carbon data directly with financial data, enhancing strategic understanding and operational transparency.

 

Enhancing Quality Management with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502: Expanding the “Manage Certificate Receipts” App with Create Mode

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release introduces the create mode in the “Manage Certificate Receipts” app, building on the foundation of innovations introduced in the 2408 release. The original app allowed users to manage and link quality certificates to purchasing documents and goods receipts which improves compliance and traceability. The new Create Mode adds flexibility by enabling users to record certificates received before goods arrive, e.g., by email, and link them to material records upon arrival.

Figure 6: Record certificate receipts before goods arrival, ensuring smoother inventory processes.

 

This enhancement also improves traceability by providing access to existing certificates tied to purchasing documents and items, ensuring complete visibility across processes. Reduce potential error sources and strengthen both transparency and compliance processes with the further evolution of our certificate management capabilities. This enhancement solidifies the Manage Certificate Receipts App as a vital tool for higher efficiency.

 

Unlocking Transformation with GROW with SAP on AWS: A New Era in Cloud ERP

Having your Experience evolution on mind, I´d like to point you to GROW with SAP on AWS, an initiative that seamlessly integrates SAP's undeniable ERP expertise with AWS's expansive cloud infrastructure. With this, SAP is offering transformative solutions for organizations adopting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This alliance is a milestone in delivering extraordinary value, tailored for a diverse array of industries, scalability, security, and innovation. GROW with SAP on AWS features a modular design with prebuilt, industry-specific capabilities which allows businesses to scale effortlessly. Rapid deployment is facilitated by proven methodologies such as SAP Activate. Businesses can transition to even swifter deployments.

Figure 7: GROW with SAP on AWS.

 

 

The collaboration on AWS Marketplace simplifies procurement and accelerates adoption, empowering companies to thrive with agility and resilience in today's digital economy. GROW with SAP on AWS emerges beyond ERP, as a transformative enabler that drives the digital transformation frontier forward.

 

Expanding Opportunities with Scalable Solutions: Empowering Partners Through ABAP Cloud Add-Ons

With the general availability of scalable solutions on stack, partners are now equipped to build and extend solutions for their customers, creating significant value and expanding capabilities. This empowerment enables partners to develop, package, and broadly distribute their solutions as ABAP Cloud add-ons, reaching a larger customer base effectively.  Partners begin by developing their extensions within their own landscape and under their own namespace. After thorough testing, the solution is registered and assembled into an installable package. Once published by the partner, it becomes available to customers on the SAP Store. Customers can explore all their purchased and available products using the Discover Product app and can subsequently deploy these solutions in their three-system landscape.

Figure 8: Expand opportunities with scalable solutions.

 

 

This approach greatly complements the existing side-by-side extensibility concept to scale applications according to growing demand, ensuring they stay agile and responsive to rapid market changes. Partners can leverage these capabilities to innovate and differentiate themselves in the competitive market, aligning their offerings closely with customer needs and business requirements as an additional option.

For more information click here. 

 

Advancing Project Efficiency: Innovations in SAP Activate Release

In the ongoing evolution of SAP Activate, we are committed to enhancing our implementation and operational guidance, continuously leveraging insights from customer projects and, in this case, early adopters of Project Lines. Our latest release introduces refined guidance in project management, which enables teams to streamline their workflows and optimize resource allocation. We have also introduced improvements in receiving provisioned environments, making it easier and faster for customers to get started with their projects. Additionally, we have enhanced the identification of activities related to the GROW Adoption Plan, ensuring that users can seamlessly integrate these into their strategic roadmaps.

Another major advancement I’d like to mention is the integration of the “SAP Activate road map viewer” into the “SAP for Me” platform.

Figure 9: SAP Activate Road Map view.

 

 

This transition simplifies access for all users of the comprehensive methodology content of SAP Activate. Seamless learning and efficient project planning are important ingrediencies of a transformed demand with 5 generations of users.

 

Key Summary

In a nutshell, The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release introduces a balanced mix of infrastructure and experience investments, enhanced AI-driven user experiences, embedded AI features, and new or enhanced ERP capabilities, rounded off by the innovative SAP Green Ledger for integrated carbon accounting within financial systems. Additionally, ABAP Cloud Add-Ons give partners an additional tool at hands to extend and differentiate solutions effectively.


Another release that paves the way for businesses to optimize efficiency, scalability, and sustainability in their transformed ERP operations. As all previous releases, it is our invitation to you to join us in the ERP revolution and start your transformative journey. Keep exploring us and keep challenging us to unlock your company's full potential in the evolving digital landscape. Stay tuned for further details in the individual blog posts diving deeper into selected lines of business and industries.

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Feel free to follow me at BeSchulze and on LinkedIn to not miss any updates. 

Yours, Bert

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

  

🔎Find All of Our Assets   

 

The release 2502 showcases 185 innovation highlights across the portfolio. Check out our release document for all the details!

Key Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Release Highlights.

 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: SAP Build Code Joule Evolves: Unveiling Multi-Agent Support for Advanced CAP Application Generation
entry.content:
As of early 2025, the optimal approach for professional developers working with Generative AI involves creating project skeletons that cover general requirements, followed by incremental enhancements. SAP Build Code Joule expands on this practice with multi-agent support, allowing developers to use a single prompt to engage specialized agents for various tasks. By coordinating these agents, Joule creates more comprehensive project foundations, thereby streamlining the development process. This approach enables developers to focus more on refining and customizing their applications, improving productivity and efficiency.

To align with these best practices for Build Code CAP developers, we've begun supporting more complex requirements for initial CAP application generation.

Note: If you're more used to the previous data model generation process, you can use a newly introduced command specifically for this purpose: /cap-gen-model.

Let's walk through the end-to-end flow to see these improvements in detail.

 

1. Create Project

Create a new Build Code Full-Stack Application from SAP Build Lobby via this navigation path: Create -> Build an Application -> SAP Build Code -> Full-Stack Application.

Note: Choose the 'Node' item from the 'Development Stack' dropdown box to see the new improvements.

Once the status of the newly created application changes from 'Pending Creation' to a normal status, click the application name to load it into the Build Code development environment. By default, the Storyboard will open automatically, and you can access the Build Code Joule panel from the left sidebar.

 

2. Initialize CAP Application

Select the /cap-gen-app command. You'll notice a new example prompt added for the capex application. You can view the full content in the Joule input field once it's selected.

Note:

For backward compatibility, SAP Build Code Joule maintains the previous functionality alongside the new multi-agent approach. You can still use the simpler generation process by typing the /cap-gen-app command without a detailed prompt, which triggers the original single-agent generation. This short-term solution allows you to choose between a comprehensive multi-agent approach for complex applications and a quicker, simpler generation for basic needs. Keep in mind that the richness of your input directly influences the comprehensiveness of the generated output.

Now, instead of showing the generated result for a simple request (only data model-related), an execution plan is displayed. The complex requirements are broken down into subtasks and we apply our best practices. As an end-user, you can review the improved user requirements and enhance them manually (via the pencil action button). This follows a popular human-in-the-loop pattern for working with Generative AI. We believe it's always easier for users to improve requirements using human language rather than adjusting generated code, which may be less familiar.

Once the improved requirements in steps are satisfactory, you can trigger the generation step-by-step manually.

Let's start with step 1 to generate the CAP data model.

After executing step 1, step 2 becomes available. You can check the generated content in the bottom 'Staging Files' UI block. Click any item to open the file content in Build Code.

Note:

  1. The staging files are in a temporary folder for review purposes only. You can manually change them if you're certain there won't be unexpected consequences for the following steps.
  2. You can rerun a step if you encounter any failures or are unsatisfied with the existing content.

Before running step 2 for sample data, let's improve it further to make the sample data more specific. Edit it, save it, and run it.

Then, proceed to step 3 for custom application logic.

You'll see two new files generated per the requirement for this step:

  1. The 'service.js' file: mapping configuration for the application logic handler and service entity events.
  2. The 'before-asserts-create.js' file: new logic attached to the entity 'Asserts' create event, triggered before every assert entity creation.

Background info on how Build Code Joule determines the application logic configuration:

  1. Validation checking logic: typically attached to the entity 'CREATE' or 'UPDATE' event in the 'before' phase.
  2. Entity property value calculation logic: typically attached to the entity 'READ' event in the 'after' phase.
  3. Custom service logic for a CAP action or function: no standard entity event, typically attached to the 'on' phase.

Note:

  1. Describe the app logic requirement more specifically to align with the above guidelines.
  2. You can still change the configuration later (after accepting the staging files) using the CAP application logic editor and adjust the logic content using the Build Code Joule command /cap-app-logic.

When all steps are executed successfully, the 'Accept' button becomes visible under the staging files. Accept the content into your working project if you're satisfied with the staging content.

The Storyboard will refresh to reflect all updated aspects: data model, sample data, service entities, and the application logic attached to the service entity.

You can switch to the detail view of the Storyboard for a better overview of each entity.

 

3. Preview the Application

After initializing the application according to the business requirements, it's time to preview it. Click the green triangle button in the top-right corner to launch it.

The CAP application will launch in local mode with sample data in a new window.

Use the 'View as table' button to check the runtime content for each entity, e.g., the 'Asserts' entity.

Click the 'Create' button to verify the application logic and see if there's a warning when the cost is exceeded. Test with sample input values.

You should see a warning message for a negative use case test and successful creation for a positive use case test.

If the application logic runs as expected, great! However, you may sometimes need to troubleshoot unexpected code issues (including data model, sample data, and FE UI annotations), debug, and ask Build Code Joule to enhance the code or make manual changes.

A Useful Tip: To improve logic codes using Build Code Joule with additional runtime data structure as the reference.

Additional info: In this flow, the cost 'Currency' field is not covered. If you click the value help button beside the cost value, you may find it empty.

Try solving this via manual changes or using Data Editor & Build Code Joule to enhance it. Here's a sample content for reference (/db/data/sap.common-Currencies.csv)

 

name;descr;code;symbol;minorUnit
US Dollar;United States Dollar;USD;$;2
Euro;Euro Member Countries;EUR;€;2
Japanese Yen;Japan Yen;JPY;¥;0
British Pound;United Kingdom Pound;GBP;£;2
Australian Dollar;Australia Dollar;AUD;$;2

 

Once everything looks good, return to Build Code and stop the preview.

As mentioned in the beginning, working with Generative AI on top of initially generated artifacts from Build Code Joule provides a good starting point for further improvements to meet additional requirements. Use Build Code Joule via available commands or visual productivity tools for further changes.

 

4. Deploy the Application

Finally, when the project is ready for deployment, navigate to the Task Explorer to deploy this app to BTP.

You'll be able to access this new CAP service app using a new BTP deployed URL.

Note:

  1. There's no 'View as table' action button for the deployed application, as it's only for local development purposes.
  2. You need create FE (or MDK) UI applications for the service entities separately.

 

P.S.

The SAP Build Code Test Drive tutorial has been updated to showcase this latest feature.

 

Summary

We hope you now have a better understanding of our latest improvements to CAP application initial generation and how it can streamline your development work. In the future, we plan to extend similar support to additional generation scenarios.

Enjoy coding with Build Code Joule assistant!

entry.title: Artificial Intelligence and Other Intelligent ERP Use Cases in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence is reshaping industries by making businesses smarter, more efficient, and more adaptable. We at SAP are at the forefront of this transformation, empowering organizations to harness the full potential of artificial intelligence.

You certainly have read that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is in general availability and will be release to our customers, for more check the release blog from @BeSchulze. In this blog post, we will have a close look at the "intelligent technologies" like AI and machine learning that are at the heart of the Cloud ERP and will help our customer run better.

For your convenience, we created this product update video that will give you a summary of what's key in the "Intelligent ERP" product update with the release 2502.

Joule, Our Natural Language, GenAI Copilot

Joule is the AI copilot for the business. Joule’s AI agents perform autonomous tasks and work together through workflows across all domains of your business including supply chain, procurement, and finance to deliver connected, enterprise-wide business outcomes. 

I am happy to announce that Joule is now generally available. With intuitive interaction, Joule transforms complex tasks into simple, efficient actions, offering instant insights, quick navigation, and guidance when needed.

Joule’s card creation feature in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 offers quick, customized snapshots of important data—like purchase orders or delivery updates—right where you need them. Not only does this save time, it also offers a great user experience!

You will find more details in this video.

AI-Assisted UX

User Experience plays a critical for a Cloud ERP,  it shapes how how customers engage with and build trust in the software. In this release as well, AI is brining our Cloud ERP user experience to the next level.

Assisted smart summarization and easy filter are here to facilitate your tasks like never before! Smart summarization leverages generative AI to summarize object pages within SAP Fiori elements-based applications. Users can review, edit, and copy these summaries into productivity tools for efficient follow-ups. It improves business data understanding, saves time, and delivers trustworthy results with easy editing. Capabilities include section selection for summarization, a structured output with a rich text editor for edits, and seamless integration for follow-ups. 

AI-assisted smart summarization.

Easy filter simplifies the process of filtering list reports of SAP Fiori elements-based applications using natural language. It harnesses the power of generative AI to streamline query inputs, providing a more intuitive experience than traditional manual filtering methods. Users can conveniently access recent and favorite queries. The innovation improves business data understanding, saves time when filtering based on known criteria, and ensures trustworthy AI results. It supports sophisticated filtering criteria and allows recent filters to be marked as favorites.

AI-assisted easy filter.

These features were shipped through a beta testing in last release and are now generally available with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.

Beta shipments are a great way of testing innovations and enhancements early on. With this release, we ship three more use cases through beta testing:

  • AI-assisted easy enterprise search: This tool enables natural language search capabilities within SAP Fiori launchpad, powered by generative AI. It streamlines the search for business objects, offering a more intuitive, efficient user experience. Key features include natural language support in the search field, adjustable settings for enabling this capability at the end-user level, and the indication of active natural language support within the search interface.
  • AI-assisted error explanation: The AI-assisted error explanation tool enhances users' understanding of errors in SAP Fiori elements-based applications, providing recommendations and solutions through generative AI. It integrates directly with error visualization, enabling one-click action to generate explanations. The innovation saves time, offers better insights into errors, and fosters an intuitive user experience. It presents a well-structured explanation containing error details and recommended solutions.
  • AI-assisted personalization of My Home: The smart personalization feature allows users to use natural language through generative AI to add insights cards to their My Home experience. It facilitates quick and easy customization of My Home with efficiently generated insights cards, previewed before addition to ensure data quality. It supports a variety of SAP Fiori elements-based apps as the basis for insights card creation, providing a time-saving, intuitive user experience with reliable AI results.

Finance and Risk Innovations Leveraging Joule

Finance is the backbone of every company: investing, reporting, budgeting, saving,... in all those domains, Joule can support business user by making the different processes seamless, more efficient, more reliable.

As you remember, I’ve shown you two use cases in beta shipments in my last product update. I am happy to share that the financial business insights into the cost center review booklet as well as the configuration for US tax jurisdictions are now generally available!

Extended Situations in the To Do section of My Home help manage complex tasks by providing AI-powered insights and actionable alerts. This feature streamlines task management by integrating situation handling, keeping you informed and focused without switching between lists and emails.

In this release, we help you stay updated on business issues, and make quick, informed decisions with Joule!

The integration of SAP's AI copilot Joule with Situation Handling enables users to receive up-to-date information on demand. Joule displays relevant issues, shares additional information, and directs users to the appropriate apps, ensuring a continuous overview of responsibilities while working on their daily tasks.

And you can now streamline decision-making with targeted recommendations using genAI!

Generative AI enhances Situation Handling by providing targeted recommendations to streamline decision-making. The extended My Situations app generates AI-driven solutions based on data context from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and external data via a chosen large language model (LLM). This integration leverages SAP Business Technology Platform for intelligent, context-aware recommendations, improving issue resolution efficiency. 

This innovation is being shipped through a beta testing. Sign up via this link: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3825”

Machine Learning Scenario

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management on SAP BTP provides a unified solution for receiving and managing supplier invoices, with connection to multiple systems such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. With this release, a brand-new machine learning scenario adds efficiencies in this process.

Document information extraction templates in Central Invoice Management enable users to create supplier-specific templates for accurate data extraction from invoices. By correcting extraction errors and training the machine learning model, these templates improve accuracy for future invoices with similar layouts. This ensures higher confidence in data extraction, reducing manual adjustments and enabling seamless invoice posting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Customize extraction templates to improve accuracy for supplier-specific invoice layouts and ensure precise data extraction.

Interested in more innovation in the release update? Read the other product updates and watch the other videos in this playlist where my team of product experts cover selected lines of business and industries.

The Future of Business, Today: Get Your Access to AI-Assisted Features Thanks to this Limited Promotion Now! 

The 2502 update is a strategic investment that combines advanced AI with powerful enterprise management tools. Whether scaling your business, enhancing productivity, or building sustainable operations, its capabilities help support a more agile and resilient future.

Sign up for following features through the limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (for all countries, customers, and partners):

  • The easy filter and smart summarization features in SAP Fiori allow for efficient, natural language filtering of business data and seamless summarization capabilities, enabling users to quickly extract relevant information and jump-start subsequent collaboration. 
  • Facilitate easier understanding and interpretation of financial data with insights from cost center reviews and explanations of fixed-asset depreciation keys.

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!  

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime. 

🔎Find All of Our Assets  

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

Click to open the SAP BTP Enablement Wheel

entry.title: Simplify how users find and share data: new AI features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2502)
entry.content:
The 2502 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is here and I am excited to share with you how we are helping you achieve more, effortlessly, with new AI capabilities for business users.

These innovations are based on many interactions and feedback sessions we had with customers in 2024, including the SAP Fiori Innovation Day events in Dublin, Chicago, and Heidelberg; as well as the collaboration we had with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers during the cloud feature beta.  

Filter business data using natural language 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted easy filter enables you to set filters in SAP Fiori elements list report applications using natural language. Rather than setting each selection field manually to drill down for the business data you need, you can write a one-line query summarizing the required information – just like you would ask one of your colleagues. A large language model then interprets this query and translates it into filter values. This simplifies your information search and helps you get to the information you need faster, which can make you more productive and help you focus on the business decisions that matter. For example, imagine a busy sales manager filtering a list of top-performing accounts using a single sentence rather than walking through a variety of filters. 

This can also shorten the training time required to use different applications, as users simply search for what they need rather than needing to memorize specific selection field options.  

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted easy filter allows you to filter business data using natural language

Of course, as the user, you are free to choose how you would like to filter your list report page. Should you wish to switch between natural language filtering and the classic method, that option is available to you. Transparency is also important to us: When you use easy filter, the filter conditions (the values automatically selected for you) are displayed as filter tokens below your query. Based on your results, you can easily try a new query or manually change the filter tokens if you need to make small changes.  

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted easy filter can simplify and streamline how you find business data in your system. Just search for what you need and it will be served up to you. It’s as easy as that!  

Summarize object pages with the help of AI 

Object pages, containing the details of items from list report applications, can be complex. To help you find the information you need easily, you can use SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted smart summarization to generate customizable summaries of SAP Fiori elements-based object pages. Select the sections you want to see and let smart summarization show you what you want to know. This simplifies your search for information and allows you to focus on the details that matter for a given business decision without having to scroll around to find everything you need. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted smart summarization allows you to generate summaries of SAP Fiori elements object pages

Once you have your summary generated, you can also make edits and share the summary with your colleagues. This simplifies how you share the information you need to move business processes forward.  

Personalize your SAP S/4HANA My Home page with Joule 

You can now use Joule to create cards for the Insights section of your My Home page that will give you personalized, business critical data at a glance. Rather than opening the required app, setting the required filters, and then creating the card natively in your SAP Fiori app; simply tell Joule what you need. It will create a card for you to preview and then you can add it to your My Home page with a single click to get access to essential information right when you log into the system, streamlining your decision making for the day. 

Insights card creation with Joule allows you to query for cards using natural language

Once your card is created, you can open the application directly from the card for further details, if required.  

Please note that this functionality is currently available for the following SAP Fiori applications for the 2502 release: Supplier Invoices List (Version 2), Manage Purchase Orders (Version 2), Manage Sales Orders, Manage Sales Orders - Version 2, Maintain Bill of Material, Find Maintenance Order, Find Maintenance Order and Operation, Manage Purchase Requisitions - Professional, and Project Control - Enterprise Projects. 

“How can I try this out?”  

We’re very excited to get these features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition out to you! Try them out, see how they can help you find, filter, and share information.

To get started, you must agree to the limited promotion terms document to get access to the features. Once you've done that, you're ready to go! 

Jump into one of your SAP-delivered list report applications to try out AI-assisted easy filter. 

Click the SAP Business AI button above the filter bar to use SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted easy filter

While you’re there, drill down into a business object and click the Summarization button at the top of the screen to create a quick summary of the data with AI-assisted smart summarization.  

Click the Summarize button at the top of your object page to use SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted smart summarization

Strike up a conversation with Joule on your My Home page and ask to create a card with data that’s relevant to you.  

Open Joule and ask for your desired business data to be displayed as a card. This can be added to your My Home page with a single click.

Once you’ve tried filtering using natural language, summarizing your object pages, or creating your own cards – we'd love to hear what you think! Feel free to share your feedback in the comments below.  

While we wait for your feedback, we’re also working on additional AI-assisted topics to simplify how you handle error messages in your system, as well as help you create cards for your Insights section directly in My Home. We look forward to sharing them with you. 

Please note that this reflects our current state of planning and SAP reserves the right to change its development priorities at any time.  

A note on data protection in AI solutions from SAP 

We are frequently asked about what happens to your business data once it runs through an AI solution from SAP. Business data and personal information processed by SAP’s AI solutions will not be used​ by third-party LLM providers for training purposes​. If you would like to learn more about our data protection practices with AI solutions, you can refer to SAP's statement on responsible AI:​ https://www.sap.com/products/artificial-intelligence/ai-ethics.html​

entry.title: Activate Joule with SAP Build Work Zone and SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
As most of you know, Joule is now supported on SAP Mobile Start (you can find the release update here). We have had multiple requests to understand how to begin with SAP Mobile Start and what is required to configure it. While this is an excellent opportunity to use Joule with your mobile device, it is also essential to know the released capabilities. This blog will focus on the activation process and the additional information required.

****************************************************************************

This blog post is a series for Joule Activation:

  • SAP Business AI – Overview for all !!! (Includes information on Joule Supported Data Centers, Different scenarios during Joule setup, etc.)
  • Joule - Unified Setup: Bridging Simplicity and Performance (Demo Video to understand the Unified Setup, Joule basics & architecture, how to set up Joule, etc.) 
  • Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
  • Joule – End-to-End Setup Guide (for all Line of Business) Unified Approach
  • Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
  • SAP Digital Supply Chain
    • Joule for SAP Integrated Business Planning (SAP IBP) – Setup Guide
  • Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide

Activate Joule with SAP Build Work Zone and SAP Mobile Start - You are Here

Blogs - Work in Progress (WIP):

  • SAP SuccessFactors Joule Activation (WIP)
  • SAP Digital Supply Chain (WIP)
    • SAP Asset Performance Management
    • SAP Product Lifecycle Management
    • SAP Digital Manufacturing
  • SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Signavio
  • SAP Concur
  • SAP Ariba
  • and more to be added towards General Availability

****************************************************************************

To begin with, let us understand the details or the options for using SAP Mobile Start (you can find the official help page here). As you have seen in my previous post, we have demonstrated the SAP Build Work Zone standard edition with a foundation plan, an always free service offering basic functionalities. To work with SAP Mobile Start, especially for the Foundation Plan of SAP Build Work Zone, we need additional content known as / that acts as a predefined central entry point and can display role-based content from SAP SuccessFactors,  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, etc.

Things to remember to plan activation of SAP Mobile Start:

  • SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition offers – a “standard plan” and “foundation plan.” You can use SAP Start can be set up with both versions
    • Foundation Plan
      • With the foundation plan, SAP Start is available to all SAP Customers at no extra cost for up to 1,000 active users per month, look up the details related to service plans and metering
      • In case more user license is required, please talk to your BTP CSP or Account Executive and look up the details related to service plans and metering
      • SAP Start is offered in limited Data Center Availability locations, and please check the list here before you create your subaccounts
      • If you plan to use SAP Start as a Central Entry Point, you may also be familiar with general restrictions related to SAP Start can be found here
    • Standard Plan
      • It offers full access to the Work Zone Design Time / Site Manager, enabling customers to customize the Sites, Content, Pages, etc., and create custom Sites with all the content. In addition, more content can be added/exposed. Additionally, with Joule, we see visibility on Roles assigned to users.
      • While the Standard Plan is pretty straightforward, I will first demonstrate the Foundation Plan options to set up Joule with the SAP Start for Mobile scenario and then look at the Standard Plan options towards the end.  
      • Offers customization of Sites and Content as well as the creation of new sites” would be more fitting
      • More information on this plan can be found on the help page here

While the Standard Plan is pretty straightforward, I will first demonstrate the Foundation Plan options to set up Joule with the SAP Start for Mobile scenario and then look at the Standard Plan options towards the end.

Another important aspect is to know what use cases are currently supported using SAP Mobile Start. You can refer to the Joule Capabilities help page.

Let us understand the setup process and let us take a look at the steps involved:

a. SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition – foundation plan

  1. Pre-requisites
  2. Manual Setup of SAP Start Formation and validate the Sites
  3. Add Joule to the SAP Start Formation
  4. Test Joule in the SAP Start Site
b. SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition – standard plan(skip it, if you followed the foundation plan setup)
c. Install SAP Mobile Start
d. Login to SAP Mobile Start
 

Let us get started:

a. SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition – foundation plan

1. Pre-requisites:

  • While executing the booster, you have selected SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition in screen 3 (Select Integration) and screen 4 (Select Capabilities)
  • In case you have not done this, you can go to SAP Business Technology Platform cockpit, expand the Systems options, click on Formations, search for the formation name, and include SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition subscription activated in the subaccount to the formation

Before we get started, please check the formation you have included in the SAP Build Work Zone listed below. If it's not listed, you can click on Include Systems, select your SAP Build Work Zone, and add it. 

Image 1

 2. Manual Setup of SAP Start Formation and validate the Sites

Let me start with a background: SAP BTP provides a Booster to activate the SAP Start; however, this is only applicable when creating a new subaccount. We are going to activate our requirement using the manual approach.  

In your SAP BTP Cockpit, navigate to System Landscape -> click on Formations -> click on Create Formation. 

For documentation, I am using the example of a subaccount with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, as shown below.

Image 2

In the Create Formation page, enter the Formation Name (ideally a similar name to your Joule subaccount where you are activating SAP Start), select the Formation Type – Integration with SAP Start as shown below, and click on Next Step.

Image 3

In the next screen, filter the “All System Types” options to SAP Build Work Zone, select the subaccount where you would like to activate the service and click on Next Step.

Image 4

On the final screen, review the settings and click on Create.

Image 5

Once you complete it, you should be able to see the formation in the Ready state, as shown below.

Image 6

To test this activation, navigate to your Joule subaccount, click on Instances and Subscriptions, and launch your SAP Build Work Zone. You should be able to see the SAP Start.

Image 7

This confirms your activation of SAP Start in your subaccount.

3. Add Joule to the SAP Start Formation

We need to add Joule to the SAP Start Formation we created in Step 2, which will allow the Joule capabilities to be integrated with the SAP Start site. To do this, go to your SAP BTP Global Account, click on System, click on Formations, look for the SAP Start Formation you just created, and click on Include Systems.

Image 8

In the “All System Types,” filter the options to Joule, select your Joule Subaccount, and click on Next Step.

Image 9

Before you add this, verify the details and click on Include.

Image 10

You should now be able to see the formation with the Joule service included.

Image 11

Once the status is “Ready”, we should be able to see the Joule Icon in the SAP Start Site.

4. Test Joule in the SAP Start Site

Navigate to your SAP Build Work Zone and launch your SAP Start Site. You should be able to see the Joule icon, as shown below.

Image 12

Click on the Joule icon to test it.

Note: I have demonstrated a stand-alone SAP Start system, and no integration to SAP SuccessFactors or SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has been established at this time.

b. SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition – standard plan (skip it, if you followed the foundation plan setup)

This process applies if you have activated the SAP Build Work Zone, standard plan with Joule, as shown in Image 1. To activate Joule, you need a Site. If your SAP Build Work Zone is new and without any sites, you can navigate to the Site Directory and click on Create Site.

Image 13

Give a Site Name and click on Create. Once the site is created, click on settings:

Image 14

Click on Edit and look for Joule under the Service option. Turn it on as shown below, and save the settings.

Image 15

If you Navigate to the Mobile Test site, you should be able to see the Joule icon, which is connected to the LoB systems that you have configured as per your requirements. The image below shows the service up and running.

Image 16

c. Install SAP Mobile Start

You can install SAP Mobile Start directly via the App Store or Google Store, or within your SAP Site, you can click on your profile, select settings, and click on the SAP Mobile Start Application. Here, you will be able to select either iOS or Android and select Install to scan the QR Code.

d. Login to SAP Mobile Start

Once you install the SAP Mobile Start application, launch it, select “Register” from the SAP Start page, and enter your login details.

Image 17

To use “SAP Mobile Start,” click on your profile icon next to Joule, then click on Settings -> click on SAP Mobile Start Application.

This completes the setup of Joule with SAP Build Work Zone and using Joule with SAP Mobile Start.

Image 18

If you have any questions about the setup, you can email us at SAP_AI_RIG@sap.com with the subject line "Joule—SAP Mobile Start." 

Happy Learning!!!

Regards,

Nagesh Caparthy

entry.title: Upcoming Webinar: The Future of AI for Talent Management
entry.content:
As the world of work continues to evolve, organizations must rethink how they attract, develop, and retain talent. With AI and talent intelligence playing an increasingly critical role, HR leaders need to embrace innovative strategies to stay ahead. Join us for an engaging webinar where we’ll explore how AI-driven innovations and skills-based talent strategies can help your organization unlock workforce potential and drive business success.

Join us on Tuesday, March 4th at 11:00 AM EST to discover how using an AI-enabled talent management system enables organizations to hire the best talent, create targeted learning pathways, optimize performance, and deliver personalized development opportunities at scale.

Key topics in this webinar include:

  • The latest HR trends and research insights on how AI is transforming talent management.
  • SAP’s AI strategy and how it supports accelerated growth, employee productivity, and skill development.
  • Live demo showcasing AI-driven innovations for attracting, retaining, and developing top talent.

Don’t miss this opportunity to see how AI can reshape your talent management strategy and empower your workforce to adapt, grow, and thrive.

Register now!
